subcodes.first_line: This is a wondrous Day whereon We behold the people stricken and the trees uprooted from their foundations, all seized by their forelocks [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا یوم عجاب نری القوم صرعی و الاشجار منقعره من الاعجاز کل اخذوا بنواصیهم من
subcodes.subjects: @predictions and prophecies, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @call to action, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @chastisement and requital, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
